title: Joel Clinton
extract: Joel Clinton (born 8 December 1981) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer who played as a prop in the 2000s and 2010s. An Australia international representative, he played his club football in the NRL for the Penrith Panthers (with whom he won the 2003 premiership) and the Brisbane Broncos. He also played for English club Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League.
